aids.title: Reversal Algorithm Steps - PCN
aids.content:
**P**revious, **C**urrent, **N**ext - the three pointers needed:
1. Save next = current->next
2. Reverse: current->next = previous
3. Advance: previous = current, current = next
4. When current is NULL, previous is the new head.

aids.title: Floyd's = Tortoise and Hare
aids.content:
Slow (tortoise) moves 1 step, Fast (hare) moves 2 steps.
If they meet: cycle exists.
If fast reaches NULL: no cycle.
Space: O(1), Time: O(n).

aids.title: Concatenation = Find End + Attach
aids.content:
To concatenate list2 to list1:
1. Traverse list1 to its last node
2. Set lastNode->next = head of list2
3. Time: O(m) where m = length of list1

aids.title: Merge Sorted Lists
aids.content:
Compare heads, pick smaller, advance that pointer.
Like a zipper merging two sorted sequences.
Time: O(m + n). Used as the merge step in merge sort for linked lists.
